>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 商品券（单券）（品牌商户）文档索引

> 商品券（单券）为单次使用的优惠券，每次发放只会发放一张券，支持满减、折扣、兑换等类型，可设置全场或单品可用，适合短期促销、新人礼、单品特惠等场景。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015989179.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016950448.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016060894.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4022248070.md)

## API 列表
- [图片上传](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736285.md)
### 商品券管理
- [创建商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736297.md)
- [修改商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736325.md)
- [查询商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736321.md)
- [失效商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736315.md)
### 商品券批次管理
- [添加商品券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736342.md)
- [查询商品券批次列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736384.md)
- [查询商品券指定批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736373.md)
- [修改商品券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736391.md)
- [修改商品券批次发放预算](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736398.md)
- [失效商品券批次](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736352.md)
- [批次关联门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736339.md)
- [查询批次关联门店列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736379.md)
- [批次取消关联门店](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736372.md)
- [预上传券CODE](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736400.md)
### 商品券发放
- [向用户发放商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736390.md)
- [确认发放用户商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736403.md)
#### 小程序发券组件
- [向用户预发放商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016416620.md)
- [调起小程序发券组件](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016418207.md)
### 商品券核销
- [核销用户商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736433.md)
- [调起小程序核销组件](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016104850.md)
### 商品券查询
- [查询用户商品券详情](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736414.md)
- [指定券状态查询用户商品券列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736420.md)
### 商品券失效与退券
- [失效用户商品券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736411.md)
- [退券](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736429.md)
### 商品券回调通知
- [设置商品券事件通知地址](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736293.md)
- [获取商品券事件通知地址](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015736292.md)
- [商品券回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015755761.md)
### 生成商品券头图
- [提交图片生成任务](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4017327724.md)
- [查询图片生成结果](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4017327728.md)
- [图片生成回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4017327730.md)
